mainEntity.name: Why do AIs favor certain LA immigration lawyers?
mainEntity.text: Why do AIs favor certain LA immigration lawyers?

acceptedAnswer.text: AIs favor LA immigration lawyers with consistent Avvo ratings, Yelp review patterns, and bar endorsements signaling broad consensus.[3]

suggestedAnswer.text: Immigration queries high-stakes; AI screens for ethics/reliability. LA volume: 50+ reviews key. Directories specify 'USCIS.' Build via pro bono mentions. Weak signals = exclusion.[3]

name: AI Bias Toward LA Immigration Lawyers
description: AIs favor LA immigration lawyers with consistent Avvo ratings, Yelp review patterns, and bar endorsements signaling broad consensus.[3]
